input.subject: Q1 contract renewal
input.body: Hi - we're up for renewal next month. Can you send the new terms?
input.intent: Acknowledge and route to account manager.

expected.subject: Re: Q1 contract renewal
expected.body: Hi Alice, thanks for reaching out. I'll loop in your account manager today to send the updated terms and walk you through any changes. Talk soon.

input.subject: Bug in dashboard
input.body: The export button doesn't work in Chrome.
input.intent: Apologize, get repro details, set expectation.

expected.subject: Re: Bug in dashboard
expected.body: Hi Bob, sorry about the trouble! Could you share which Chrome version you're on and a screenshot of what happens when you click export? I'll route this to engineering as soon as I have the details.
